description: A portrait of a young man in a black bowler hat and dark suit with a white shirt and tie. He sits with his hands clasped before him, gazing forward with a composed, somewhat aloof expression. The background is a rich dark red on the left, darkening to black on the right. Text reading 'PAUL GUILLAUME' is inscribed at the upper left, and 'NOVO PILOTA' at the lower left. The style is simplified with elongated features and flat tonal areas.
